name: GIGABYTE Z890 AERO G ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9200(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 5x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - Dual 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 - Optical S/PDIF Out
shortName: GIGABYTE Z890 AERO G ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports
description: Full-size ATX LGA 1851 motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0, DDR5-9200, Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 7 for Intel 890.
